---
name: Partnership Proposal
about: Propose a partnership or integration with ERNE
labels: partnership
---

## Organization / Project

- **Name**:
- **Website**:
- **GitHub**:
- **Category**: (React Native library / Expo tool / Mobile agency / AI tool vendor / Education / Other)

## Partnership Type

What kind of collaboration are you interested in?

- [ ] **Skill Integration** — Add best practices for your library as an ERNE skill
- [ ] **MCP Config** — Add your service as a one-click MCP integration
- [ ] **Agent Collaboration** — Co-develop a specialized ERNE agent
- [ ] **Rule Layer** — Add your coding standards as an optional rule set
- [ ] **Co-Marketing** — Cross-promote on websites, READMEs, and marketplaces
- [ ] **Custom Integration** — Something else (describe below)

## What You Bring

How does your tool/library/service complement ERNE? What value would this add for React Native developers?

## Proposed Scope

What would the integration look like? (e.g., "A skill that teaches AI agents to use our animation library correctly" or "An MCP config for our backend service")

## Contact

Best way to reach you for discussion (email, Twitter/X, Discord, etc.)

## Additional Context

Links to docs, examples, or anything that helps us understand the partnership opportunity.
